entry.value:
[["currentConversationId","pins","agentExecutionMode","isPanelCollapsed","displayedAnnouncements","conversations","onboarding","a|0|1|2|3|4|5|6","b7605a04-1e0c-4f94-8dd9-a79d0df90140","o|","auto","b|T","a|","a|8","id","createdAtIso","lastInteractedAtIso","selectedModelId","requestIds","isPinned","isShareable","extraData","personaType","feedbackStates","rootTaskUuid","name","toolUseStates","chatHistory","draftExchange","a|E|F|G|H|I|J|K|L|M|N|O|P|Q|R|S","2026-02-20T12:48:54.547Z","2026-04-08T21:22:12.496Z","claude-opus-4-6","b|F","isAgentConversation","baselineTimestamp","a|Y|Z","n|VBlqfil","o|a|B|b","n|0","acf72c20-8427-473f-b596-5515721e9600","PaperSense Backend Bug Fixes & Enhancements","request_id","uuid","chatItemType","status","fromTimestamp","toTimestamp","seen_state","a|g|h|i|j|k|l|m","c8357d2a-5a9e-43d8-a501-7c102b9be6ee","8c1ad856-5f03-4bcb-9a37-4daee6bdfc72","agentic-checkpoint-delimiter","success","n|VBlqN3N","n|VBlqexu","seen","o|n|o|p|q|r|s|t|u","exchangeUuid","timestamp","request_message","a|i|w|x|y|j|m","exchange-pointer","76e310a0-38d4-4256-b108-d6f4af2a93a0","2026-02-20T12:50:02.595Z","Role : professional AI Engineer
Main Idea :

Researchers face information overload as the number of academic papers grows rapidly. Traditional keyword search engines often return long lists of results without context, making it difficult to extract key findings, methodologies, and limitations. This thesis proposes building a Smart Research Paper Analyzer that combines Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) with Large Language Models (LLMs) to deliver context-aware summaries, structured insights, and citation-linked answers directly from research papers.

How It Will Be Implemented:
The pipeline will include PDF parsing, chunking, embeddings, vector storage, retrieval, and LLM-based generation. 
•	Open-source stack: SentenceTransformers, Qdrant/Chroma, Llama 3/Mistral/Gemini.

•	Frontend : Next.js + React, pdf.js , TailwindCSS, shadcn/ui.
•	API : FastAPI

","o|z|10|11|12|13|r|u","revertTarget","a|g|h|i|j|k|l|15|m","cd88c094-ed49-449d-9539-5de7774918f7","535497bf-2371-40cb-9859-e4e469d3c999","a|h","o|19|p","o|16|17|18|q|r|t|b|1A|u","a|g|j|i","f6f9f5e3-2b42-410f-a6d5-bb4c31c2e7d5","cancelled","agentic-turn-delimiter","o|1C|1D|1E|1F","5d9d0508-4f29-4ee0-95d4-771e70d727d0","2026-02-20T12:50:07.881Z","","o|z|10|1H|1I|1J|1E|u","396db762-60db-4e14-b4f9-1bb6156c8336","2026-02-20T12:51:23.991Z","Main Idea :
Researchers face information overload as the number of academic papers grows rapidly. Traditional keyword search engines often return long lists of results without context, making it difficult to extract key findings, methodologies, and limitations. This thesis proposes building a Smart Research Paper Analyzer that combines Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) with Large Language Models (LLMs) to deliver context-aware summaries, structured insights, and citation-linked answers directly from research papers.
Motivation:
Such a system would significantly reduce the time needed for literature review, support evidence-based research, and improve accessibility of academic knowledge. By providing citation-grounded summaries, it addresses the common issue of hallucination in LLMs, ensuring reliability.
Where It Is Applied:
The tool will be applied in academic research, higher education, and R&D-driven industries where rapid synthesis of scientific literature is essential.
How It Will Be Implemented:
The pipeline will include PDF parsing, chunking, embeddings, vector storage, retrieval, and LLM-based generation. 
•	Open-source stack: SentenceTransformers, Qdrant/Chroma, Llama 3/Mistral.
•	Frontend : Next.js + React, pdf.js , TailwindCSS, shadcn/ui.
•	API : FastAPI

goal :
IMplement the core algorithim for the backend using Qdrant OpenAI utility and Gemini api key assume the google api key is in the .env file","o|z|10|1L|1M|1N|r|u","b8747342-1846-4a3c-813f-e0aa92b9acb7","2026-02-20T12:51:27.828Z","o|z|10|1P|1Q|1J|r|u","5fe4c9eb-2f2c-4f79-a0ef-854101ebd7c2","2026-02-20T12:51:38.775Z","unseen","o|z|10|1S|1T|1J|r|1U","4d55a4f4-a335-4c65-9465-b27e9dd07c23","2026-02-20T12:51:42.720Z","o|z|10|1W|1X|1J|r|u","8c36c3fd-4a3c-40c7-8ba9-abfba37efc38","2026-02-20T12:51:54.085Z","o|z|10|1Z|1a|1J|r|u","25773314-f1e4-4212-aac4-c2484c4e2200","2026-02-20T12:52:01.148Z","o|z|10|1c|1d|1J|r|u","1b99f2b8-5248-4b64-b69b-9aec9a429a80","2026-02-20T12:52:13.031Z","o|z|10|1f|1g|1J|r|u","e3cd836c-66bc-4230-8a51-1ecabe94f204","2026-02-20T12:52:27.283Z","o|z|10|1i|1j|1J|r|u","2d2205a6-928e-44a7-bff7-3ddf8b51c144","2026-02-20T12:52:49.169Z","o|z|10|1l|1m|1J|r|u","4f0535c9-70c2-4615-a78e-69ead2b15255","2026-02-20T12:53:04.784Z","o|z|10|1o|1p|1J|r|u","95b10d50-232b-4088-bcf1-e938184774d7","2026-02-20T12:53:21.966Z","o|z|10|1r|1s|1J|r|u","21c8ecbf-1b8f-4ccf-9af8-ff2fc03cfda1","2026-02-20T12:53:35.592Z","o|z|10|1u|1v|1J|r|u","b48eea16-0a8f-4159-977b-3a6811da56a2","2026-02-20T12:53:59.293Z","o|z|10|1x|1y|1J|r|u","e76a0b24-7b5d-4e81-aab2-0556bf2000b0","2026-02-20T12:54:21.901Z","o|z|10|20|21|1J|r|u","3b9f00f3-2a5d-4cfb-b6d9-2fc3e8fffb72","2026-02-20T12:54:38.564Z","o|z|10|23|24|1J|r|u","6986822a-116c-47d4-8a50-64840c58a777","2026-02-20T12:54:42.836Z","o|z|10|26|27|1J|r|u","37b5ce7c-f574-4e03-921f-80dc5b92d164","2026-02-20T12:55:00.142Z","o|z|10|29|2A|1J|r|u","a917db3b-9b8c-4e7f-92cd-4832154102e7","2026-02-20T12:55:13.350Z","o|z|10|2C|2D|1J|r|u","4ebdabf6-5443-4066-8aa3-bd8fe5ffa021","2026-02-20T12:55:33.466Z","o|z|10|2F|2G|1J|r|u","79ef1b8d-4950-4db9-a888-bad68f8d8ee8","2026-02-20T12:55:42.398Z","o|z|10|2I|2J|1J|r|u","e1dcc207-a666-43a3-95d5-bd91691392cc","2026-02-20T12:55:50.886Z","o|z|10|2L|2M|1J|r|u","5181422c-a55b-46a4-9f57-134cab168a2e","2026-02-20T12:55:57.999Z","o|z|10|2O|2P|1J|r|u","29269fd5-059d-4e29-bd8a-bc0cd56e0b40","2026-02-20T12:56:03.457Z","o|z|10|2R|2S|1J|r|u","17291d39-c8d3-4bfe-9673-b
